reason: Required lint/type-check/build baseline, narrow-toolbar geometry, semantic tokens, floating-menu checks, and regression expectations.
Review inline repository-section accessibility, selectable rows, lightweight More menu Escape/outside handling, dense layout, and split-panel stability.
Verify every selected-repository read/write is re-authorized, context races are isolated, shared refs invalidate safely, and transient paths/drafts are not persisted.
Verify the closed target union, shared context/snapshot contracts, null/unknown semantics, and full Git object IDs across layers.
Trace visible selected context through component, store authorization, bridge path, preload Git root, response application, and error propagation.
Check repository target comparison, context keys, authorization, and refresh/write coordination are not duplicated or allowed to drift.
Check the implemented top repository section, target-aware operations, renderer-session selection/drafts, state-switching rules, and safety matrix against the revised design.
Check parser/process behavior against sourced Git formats, compatibility, concurrency limits, and focused real-repository fixtures; ignore superseded overlay recommendations.
